text: Notwithstanding subdivision (a) of Section 28111, the State Air Resources Board may adopt regulations providing for exemptions from antisiphoning device requirements for categories of vehicles of 1993 and later model-years which it determines not susceptible to siphoning.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 16. Methanol or Ethanol Fueled Vehicles [28110 - 28114]
##### § 28112

Notwithstanding subdivision (a) of Section 28111, the State Air Resources Board may adopt regulations providing for exemptions from antisiphoning device requirements for categories of vehicles of 1993 and later model-years which it determines not susceptible to siphoning.

*(Added by Stats. 1989, Ch. 1301, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding subdivision (a) of Section 28111, the State Air Resources Board may adopt regulations providing for exemptions from antisiphoning device requirements for categories of vehicles of 1993 and later model-years which it determines not susceptible to siphoning.
